title: SQLite Database Creation, Connection, and Transaction Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of creating an SQLite database, establishing a connection, and performing database operations within a transaction in mobile app development.
relationships: App initializes SQLiteOpenHelper to create/connect to Database File
Transaction Block begins to group SQL Operations
Successful operations lead to Commit, which saves changes
Failed operations trigger Rollback, which undoes all changes in the transaction
